description: OAuth refactor with docs guide update - auth domain mixed with UI components
rationale: apps/docs/content/guides/auth/ path contains 'auth' substring = auth domain (10 lines). OAuthApp*.tsx components = ui domain (418 lines). 2 unrelated domains = WARNING.
notes: Interesting: the 'auth' domain is triggered by a DOCS file (guides/auth/...) not actual auth code. The bulk is UI component refactoring. The auth doc change should be a separate PR.
